name: logistics dispatch managers processing 50–100 deliveries/day tool
description: For logistics dispatch managers processing 50–100 deliveries/day, delivery exceptions cause late orders. We compile daily exception reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to quickly identify and resolve delivery exceptions, leading to late orders.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to quickly identify and resolve delivery exceptions, leading to late orders.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics dispatch managers processing 50–100 deliveries/day, delivery exceptions cause late orders. We compile daily exception reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of delivery exceptions through spreadsheets

one_liner: For logistics dispatch managers processing 50–100 deliveries/day, delivery exceptions cause late orders. We compile daily exception reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
